zh.lifeSummary: 當Morfydd ferch Madog於1238年出生時，她的父親Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd49歲，母親Tangwystyll40歲。她於1257年與Iorwerth ap GRONWY結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morfydd ferch Madog于1238年出生时，她的父亲Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd49岁，母亲Tangwystyll40岁。她于1257年与Iorwerth ap GRONWY结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Morfydd ferch Madog was born in 1238, her father, Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd, was 49 and her mother, Tangwystyll, was 40. She married Iorwerth ap GRONWY in 1257. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1298, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morfydd ferch Madog est née en 1238, son père, Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Tangwystyll, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Iorwerth ap GRONWY en 1257. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1298, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morfydd ferch Madog 1238 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd 49 und ihre Mutter Tangwystyll 40. Sie hat 1257 Iorwerth ap GRONWY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Morfydd ferch Madog è nata il nel 1238, sua padre, Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Tangwystyll, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Iorwerth ap GRONWY nel 1257. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1298, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Morfydd ferch Madogが1238年に生まれた時，父Madog " Goch" ap Gruffyddは49歳，母Tangwystyllは40歳であった。1257年にIorwerth ap GRONWYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Morfydd ferch Madog(이)가 1238년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tangwystyll(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1257년 Iorwerth ap GRONWY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morfydd ferch Madog nasceu em 1238, seu pai, Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Tangwystyll, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Iorwerth ap GRONWY em 1257. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1298, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morfydd ferch Madog родилась в 1238 г., её отцу по имени Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Tangwystyll, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwerth ap GRONWY в 1257 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1298 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Morfydd ferch Madog nació en 1238, su papá, Madog " Goch" ap Gruffydd, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Tangwystyll, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Iorwerth ap GRONWY en 1257. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1298, a la edad de 60 años.
